name: Ron Miles
abstract: Ronald Glen Miles (May 9, 1963 – March 8, 2022) was an American jazz trumpeter, cornetist, and composer. He recorded for the labels Prolific (1986), Capri (1990), and Gramavision.

concerts.label: Bill Frisell / Bill Morrison: The Great Flood

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Lamb
about_quotes.evidence: Ron Miles who is a beautiful trumpet player. So I booked this thing for eight and a half years... I would play.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chuck Lamb interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, February 7, 2023
